headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -117.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 147% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 146 quotes at 68.6, driven by an overwhelming 126 strong-intensity comments - people are really venting today.

• This frustration level sits in the upper-middle range of the past 72 days, while fears jumped dramatically from yesterday's low of -15.8 to 8.3.

• Optimism remains deeply negative at -40.2, showing only slight improvement from yesterday's -7.8 but still well below typical levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
